fr.alt: Cédric est un hôte excellent. Nous avons séjourné dans le studio pendant environ 3 mois. L'emplacement est magnifique et paisible. Proche d'un supermarché, de restaurants et de l'arrêt de train (13 min à pied). En marchant vers le train, on croise des chèvres, vaches et chevaux. Cédric a toujours été attentif et nous a beaucoup aidés. Il connaît parfaitement la région. Je recommande vivement !
fr.author: Etienne Palos
fr.caption: Cédric est un hôte excellent

fr.alt: Hote très sympathique et réactif. Nous reviendrons. Lieu très paisible et charmant.
fr.author: Florence Berguerre
fr.caption: Hote très sympathique et réactif

fr.alt: Un studio très complet, on se sent comme à la maison. Tout l'équipement nécessaire est présent, surtout en cuisine. Tout était parfait.
fr.author: Cheong7
fr.caption: Un studio très complet, on se sent comme à la maison

fr.alt: Superbe studio dans un quartier calme avec tout le confort. Propriétaires très sympathiques. Logement tout équipé avec lave-vaisselle, lave-linge et sèche-linge. Lit confortable.

fr.alt: Bel appartement, petit mais avec tout le nécessaire. Je reviendrai avec plaisir.

fr.alt: Superbe studio dans un quartier calme avec tout le confort. Propriétaires très sympathiques. Logement tout équipé avec lave-vaisselle, lave-linge et sèche-linge. Lit confortable.

fr.alt: Hôtes géniaux, toujours disponibles. Petit studio au rez-de-chaussée, idéal pour un couple avec 2 enfants. Les photos correspondent à 100%. Situé à la campagne, très calme et proche de tout.
fr.author: Pedro
fr.caption: Hôtes géniaux, toujours disponibles

fr.alt: Fabuleux. L'emplacement et le calme. A proximité de tout
fr.author: Buckinx-finck
fr.caption: L'emplacement et le calme

fr.alt: Exceptionnel. Emplacement très paisible... appartement très bien équipé, merci à Cédric pour les petits jouets pour notre fils de 6 ans.
fr.author: Zakia
fr.caption: Emplacement très paisible

fr.alt: À la campagne et pourtant à 5 minutes de la ville. Très calme. Les hôtes ont été très serviables et tout simplement super. Super appartement équipé de tout. Je reviendrai avec plaisir.
fr.author: Monika
fr.caption: À la campagne et pourtant à 5 minutes de la ville

fr.alt: Ravi du séjour chez Cédric et sa famille, accueillants et à l'écoute. Idéal pour la tranquillité et les paysages.
fr.author: Slim
fr.caption: Ravi du séjour chez Cédric et sa famille, accueillants et à l'écoute

fr.alt: Nous avons passé un excellent séjour au C&C Eco Studio. Cédric et Céline sont des hôtes superbes, très accueillants et sympathiques. Le studio est parfaitement équipé pour vivre en toute indépendance, à court ou à long terme. Je recommande vivement, vous ne serez pas déçus !
fr.author: Paul
fr.caption: Nous avons passé un excellent séjour au C&C Eco Studio

fr.alt: Tout d'abord je tiens à remercier Cédric et sa famille pour leur accueil, sympathie et leur très grand sens de l'hospitalité ainsi que leur présence et leur discrétion. L'appartement est très bien situé au calme. L'autoroute est à moins de 10 mn. Et la gare, les commerces et la poste à une dizaine de minutes à pied. Ayant logé à plusieurs reprises dans cet appartement, je ne puis que le recommandé avec la note 10/10!!!
fr.author: Danila
fr.caption: Tout d'abord je tiens à remercier Cédric et sa famille pour leur accueil, sym...

fr.alt: Endroit merveilleux. Situé dans une région magnifique, le studio paraissait beaucoup plus grand et disposait de tout le nécessaire.
fr.author: Fabienne
fr.caption: Endroit merveilleux

fr.alt: Je ne peux que recommander. J'étais là pour le travail, mais tout était très agréable.
fr.author: Helmut
fr.caption: Je ne peux que recommander

fr.alt: J'ai séjourné ici pendant plus d'un mois. Vous trouverez tout ce dont vous avez besoin au studio. Une cuisine très bien équipée, télévision avec chromecast et apple tv, une bonne douche, lave-linge, sèche-linge. Pour moi, c'était parfait !
fr.author: Joey
fr.caption: J'ai séjourné ici pendant plus d'un mois

fr.alt: Cédric et Céline sont des hôtes incroyables et ont toujours été ravis d'aider. J'ai séjourné assez longtemps dans le studio et il est extrêmement bien équipé, propre, spacieux et très bien situé dans une belle région avec des liaisons de transport. Un vrai bijou 😁
fr.author: Guest
fr.caption: Cédric et Céline sont des hôtes incroyables et ont toujours été ravis d'aider

en.alt: Cédric is an excellent host. We stayed at the studio for roughly ~3 months. First, the location is beautiful - peace is what you will find there. It is conveniently close to a supermarket, a restaurants, and train stop (13 min walk) Walking from the studio to the train stop, you will meet goats, sheep, cows and horses while appreciating the Fribourgeois landscape. Cedric was always attentive and was fully invested in assisting us whenever we needed, and it is easy to have a nice conversation with him. With his guidance, we learned so much about the area, where to find, how to get around, etc. If you are looking to explore Switzerland 🇨🇭 and/or you consider staying in Fribourg, I give my strongest recommendation to C&C Eco Studio!
en.author: Etienne Palos
en.caption: Cédric is an excellent host

en.alt: Very friendly and responsive host. We will come back. Very peaceful and charming place.
en.author: Florence Berguerre
en.caption: Very friendly and responsive host

en.alt: Value for Money. A very complete studio, just feel like home and you have what you need. A very complete kitchen facility. Not really... things were really fine.
en.author: Cheong7
en.caption: Value for Money

en.alt: Superbe studio dans un quartier calme avec tout le confort. Propriétaires très sympathiques. Logement tout équipé avec lave-vaisselle, lave-linge et sèche-linge. Lit confortable.

en.caption: Superbe studio dans un quartier calme avec tout le confort

en.alt: Excellent rapport qualité-prix, idéal pour visiter la Suisse romande. Calme, au milieu des animaux. Gentillesse des propriétaires, lave-linge, lave-vaisselle et cuisine équipée.
en.author: Laura
en.caption: Excellent rapport qualité-prix, idéal pour visiter la Suisse romande

en.alt: Nice little apartment with everything you need. I would love to come back.
en.author: Christian
en.caption: Nice little apartment with everything you need

en.alt: Great studio in a quiet area with all amenities. Friendly owners. Fully equipped accommodation with dishwasher, washing machine and dryer. Comfortable bed.
en.author: Joao
en.caption: Great studio in a quiet area with all amenities

en.alt: Top hosts, always available. Small studio on the ground floor, ideal for a couple with 2 children. Photos are 100% accurate. Located in the countryside, very quiet and close to everything.
en.author: Pedro
en.caption: Top hosts, always available

en.alt: Fabulous. The location and the calm. Close to everything
en.author: Buckinx-finck
en.caption: Fabulous

en.alt: Exceptional. Very peaceful location... very well equipped apartment, thanks to Cédric for the little toys for our 6 year old son.
en.author: Zakia
en.caption: Exceptional

en.alt: In the countryside and yet 5 minutes from the city. Very quiet. The hosts were very helpful and just great. Great apartment equipped with everything. I would love to come back.
en.author: Monika
en.caption: In the countryside and yet 5 minutes from the city

en.alt: Happy with the stay at Cédric's family, welcoming and attentive. Ideal for tranquility and landscapes.
en.author: Slim
en.caption: Happy with the stay at Cédric's family, welcoming and attentive

en.alt: We had a great stay at C&C Eco Studio. Cédric and Céline are superb very welcoming and friendly hosts. The studio is perfectly equipped to live independently both short and long term. I would highly recommend, you will not be disappointed!
en.author: Paul
en.caption: We had a great stay at C&C Eco Studio

en.alt: First of all, I want to thank Cédric and his family for their welcome, sympathy and their great sense of hospitality as well as their presence and discretion. The apartment is very well located in a quiet area. The motorway is less than 10 mins away. And the station, shops and post office about ten minutes away on foot. Having stayed in this apartment several times, I can only recommend it with a score of 10/10!!!
en.author: Danila
en.caption: First of all, I want to thank Cédric and his family for their welcome, sympat...

en.alt: Wonderful place to stay. It’s in an absolutely stunning area and the studio didn’t feel like a studio, it felt much bigger and it had everything I needed.
en.author: Fabienne
en.caption: Wonderful place to stay

en.alt: I can only recommend it. I was there for work, but everything was very pleasant.
en.author: Helmut
en.caption: I can only recommend it

en.alt: I stayed here for over a month. You'll find everything you need at the studio. A very well equipped kitchen, television with chromecast and apple tv, a good shower, washing machine, dryer. To me it was perfect!
en.author: Joey
en.caption: I stayed here for over a month

en.alt: Cédric and Céline are amazing hosts and were always happy to help. I stayed for for a relatively long time in the studio and it's extremely well equipped, clean, spacious and well located in a beautiful area with transport links. Truly a gem 😁
en.author: Guest
en.caption: Cédric and Céline are amazing hosts and were always happy to help.

de.caption: Tolles Studio in ruhiger Lage mit allen Annehmlichkeiten

de.alt: Top Gastgeber, immer verfügbar. Kleines Studio im Erdgeschoss, ideal für ein Paar mit 2 Kindern. Fotos entsprechen zu 100%. Ruhig auf dem Land gelegen und nah an allem.

de.caption: Top Gastgeber, immer verfügbar

de.alt: Fabelhaft. Die Lage und die Ruhe. In der Nähe von allem

de.caption: Fabelhaft

de.caption: Außergewöhnlich

de.alt: Auf dem Land und doch in 5 Minuten in der Stadt. Sehr Ruhig. Die Gastgeber waren sehr hilfsbereit und einfach super.. Tolle Wohnung mit allem ausgestattet. Ich komme gerne wieder.
de.author: Monika
de.caption: Auf dem Land und doch in 5 Minuten in der Stadt

de.alt: Froh über den Aufenthalt bei Cédric und seiner Familie, gastfreundlich und aufmerksam. Ideal für Ruhe und Landschaften.
de.author: Slim
de.caption: Froh über den Aufenthalt bei Cédric und seiner Familie, gastfreundlich und au...

de.alt: Wir hatten einen tollen Aufenthalt im C&C Eco Studio. Cédric und Céline sind hervorragende, sehr herzliche und freundliche Gastgeber. Das Studio ist perfekt ausgestattet, um sowohl kurz- als auch langfristig unabhängig zu leben. Ich kann es nur wärmstens empfehlen, Sie werden nicht enttäuscht sein!
de.author: Paul
de.caption: Wir hatten einen tollen Aufenthalt im C&C Eco Studio

de.alt: Zunächst einmal möchte ich Cédric und seiner Familie für den Empfang, die Sympathie und die große Gastfreundschaft sowie für ihre Anwesenheit und Diskretion danken. Die Wohnung ist sehr gut und ruhig gelegen. Die Autobahn ist weniger als 10 Minuten entfernt. Und der Bahnhof, Geschäfte und die Post sind in etwa zehn Minuten zu Fuß erreichbar. Da ich mehrmals in dieser Wohnung übernachtet habe, kann ich sie nur mit der Note 10/10 empfehlen!!!
de.author: Danila
de.caption: Zunächst einmal möchte ich Cédric und seiner Familie für den Empfang, die Sym...

de.alt: Wunderbarer Ort. In einer absolut atemberaubenden Gegend, das Studio fühlte sich viel größer an und hatte alles, was ich brauchte.
de.author: Fabienne
de.caption: Wunderbarer Ort

de.alt: Kann ich nur weiter empfehlen. War zwar beruflich in dieser Unterkunft, aber alles sehr angenehm.
de.author: Helmut
de.caption: Kann ich nur weiter empfehlen

de.alt: Ich war über einen Monat hier. Im Studio findet man alles, was man braucht. Eine sehr gut ausgestattete Küche, Fernseher mit Chromecast und Apple TV, eine gute Dusche, Waschmaschine, Trockner. Für mich war es perfekt!
de.author: Joey
de.caption: Ich war über einen Monat hier

de.alt: Cédric und Céline sind fantastische Gastgeber und haben immer gerne geholfen. Ich war für eine relativ lange Zeit im Studio und es ist extrem gut ausgestattet, sauber, geräumig und sehr gut gelegen in einer wunderschönen Gegend mit Verkehrsanbindung. Ein wahres Juwel 😁
de.author: Guest
de.caption: Cédric und Céline sind fantastische Gastgeber und haben immer gerne geholfen

es.alt: Fabuloso. La ubicación y la calma. Cerca de todo

es.caption: Excepcional

es.alt: En el campo y a 5 minutos de la ciudad. Muy tranquilo. Los anfitriones fueron muy serviciales y geniales. Estupendo apartamento equipado con todo. Volveré con gusto.
es.author: Monika
es.caption: En el campo y a 5 minutos de la ciudad

es.alt: Feliz con la estancia en casa de Cédric y su familia, acogedores y atentos. Ideal para la tranquilidad y los paisajes.
es.author: Slim
es.caption: Feliz con la estancia en casa de Cédric y su familia, acogedores y atentos

es.alt: Tuvimos una estancia fantástica en C&C Eco Studio. Cédric y Céline son unos anfitriones magníficos, muy acogedores y amables. El estudio está perfectamente equipado para vivir de forma independiente tanto a corto como a largo plazo. Lo recomiendo mucho, ¡no te decepcionará!
es.author: Paul
es.caption: Tuvimos una estancia fantástica en C&C Eco Studio

es.alt: En primer lugar quiero agradecer a Cédric y su familia por su acogida, simpatía y su gran sentido de la hospitalidad, así como por su presencia y discreción. El apartamento está muy bien situado en una zona tranquila. La autopista está a menos de 10 minutos. Y la estación, comercios y correos a unos diez minutos a pie. Habiéndome alojado en varias ocasiones en este apartamento, ¡no puedo sino recomendarlo con una nota de 10/10!!!
es.author: Danila
es.caption: En primer lugar quiero agradecer a Cédric y su familia por su acogida, simpat...

es.alt: Lugar maravilloso. Situado en una zona impresionante, el estudio parecía mucho más grande y tenía todo lo que necesitaba.
es.author: Fabienne
es.caption: Lugar maravilloso

es.alt: Solo puedo recomendarlo. Estuve allí por trabajo, pero todo fue muy agradable.
es.author: Helmut
es.caption: Solo puedo recomendarlo

es.alt: Me quedé aquí por más de un mes. Encontrarás todo lo que necesitas en el estudio. Una cocina muy bien equipada, televisión con chromecast y apple tv, una buena ducha, lavadora, secadora. Para mí, ¡fue perfecto!
es.author: Joey
es.caption: Me quedé aquí por más de un mes

es.alt: Cédric y Céline son anfitriones increíbles y siempre estuvieron dispuestos a ayudar. Me alojé durante bastante tiempo en el estudio y está extremadamente bien equipado, limpio, espacioso y bien situado en una hermosa zona con conexiones de transporte. Una verdadera joya 😁

es.caption: Cédric y Céline son anfitriones increíbles y siempre estuvieron dispuestos a ayudar

pt.caption: Excelente estúdio em zona tranquila com todas as comodidades

Pequeno estúdio no rés-do-chão da habitação dos anfitriões, ideal para casal ou casal com 2 crianças pequenas, as fotos mostram a 100% o que é o estúdio. Localiza-se na campanha, local muito sossegado e perto de tudo (comércios e vias de acesso aos principais pontos turísticos).

pt.caption: Fiquei aqui mais de um mês

pt.alt: Cédric e Céline são anfitriões incríveis e estiveram sempre prontos a ajudar. Fiquei no estúdio por um período relativamente longo e é extremamente bem equipado, limpo, espaçoso e bem localizado numa área bonita com ligações de transporte. Uma verdadeira joia 😁
pt.author: Guest
pt.caption: Cédric e Céline são anfitriões incríveis e estiveram sempre prontos a ajudar

it.alt: Cédric est un hôte excellent. Nous avons séjourné dans le studio pendant environ 3 mois. L'emplacement est magnifique et paisible. Proche d'un supermarché, de restaurants et de l'arrêt de train (13 min à pied). En marchant vers le train, on croise des chèvres, vaches et chevaux. Cédric a toujours été attentif et nous a beaucoup aidés. Il connaît parfaitement la région. Je recommande vivement !
it.author: Etienne Palos
it.caption: Cédric est un hôte excellent

it.alt: Hote très sympathique et réactif. Nous reviendrons. Lieu très paisible et charmant.
it.author: Florence Berguerre
it.caption: Hote très sympathique et réactif

it.alt: Un studio très complet, on se sent comme à la maison. Tout l'équipement nécessaire est présent, surtout en cuisine. Tout était parfait.
it.author: Cheong7
it.caption: Un studio très complet, on se sent comme à la maison

it.alt: Superbe studio dans un quartier calme avec tout le confort. Propriétaires très sympathiques. Logement tout équipé avec lave-vaisselle, lave-linge et sèche-linge. Lit confortable.
it.author: Joao
it.caption: Superbe studio dans un quartier calme avec tout le confort

it.alt: Ottimo rapporto prezzo qualità, ottima posizione per visitare la svizzera francese. Posizione fuori città in mezzo agli animali, gentilezza proprietari, lavatrice e lavastoviglie, cucina attrezzata, guide e cartine disponibili, wifi. Niente.
it.author: Laura
it.caption: Ottimo rapporto prezzo qualità, ottima posizione per visitare la svizzera fra...

it.alt: Bel appartamentino con tutto il necessario. Tornerò volentieri.
it.author: Christian
it.caption: Bel appartamentino con tutto il necessario

it.alt: Ottimo studio in zona tranquilla con tutti i comfort. Proprietari molto gentili. Alloggio completamente attrezzato con lavastoviglie, lavatrice e asciugatrice. Letto comodo.
it.author: Joao
it.caption: Ottimo studio in zona tranquilla con tutti i comfort

it.alt: Padroni di casa eccezionali, sempre disponibili. Piccolo studio al piano terra, ideale per una coppia con 2 bambini. Le foto corrispondono al 100%. Situato in campagna, molto tranquillo e vicino a tutto.
it.author: Pedro
it.caption: Padroni di casa eccezionali, sempre disponibili

it.alt: Favoloso. La posizione e la calma. Vicino a tutto
it.author: Buckinx-finck
it.caption: Favoloso

it.alt: Eccezionale. Posizione molto tranquilla... appartamento molto ben attrezzato, grazie a Cédric per i piccoli giocattoli per nostro figlio di 6 anni.
it.author: Zakia
it.caption: Eccezionale

it.alt: In campagna eppure a 5 minuti dalla città. Molto tranquillo. I padroni di casa sono stati molto gentili e semplicemente fantastici. Ottimo appartamento dotato di tutto. Tornerò volentieri.
it.author: Monika
it.caption: In campagna eppure a 5 minuti dalla città

it.alt: Felice del soggiorno da Cédric e famiglia, accoglienti e attenti. Ideale per la tranquillità e i paesaggi.
it.author: Slim
it.caption: Felice del soggiorno da Cédric e famiglia, accoglienti e attenti

it.alt: Abbiamo trascorso un soggiorno fantastico al C&C Eco Studio. Cédric e Céline sono padroni di casa superbi, molto accoglienti e gentili. Lo studio è perfettamente attrezzato per vivere in modo indipendente sia a breve che a lungo termine. Lo consiglio vivamente, non rimarrete delusi!
it.author: Paul
it.caption: Abbiamo trascorso un soggiorno fantastico al C&C Eco Studio

it.alt: Innanzitutto vorrei ringraziare Cédric e la sua famiglia per l'accoglienza, la simpatia e il grande senso di ospitalità, nonché per la loro presenza e discrezione. L'appartamento è situato in una posizione molto tranquilla. L'autostrada è a meno di 10 minuti. E la stazione, i negozi e l'ufficio postale sono a circa dieci minuti a piedi. Essendo stato in questo appartamento diverse volte, non posso che consigliarlo con un voto di 10/10!!!
it.author: Danila
it.caption: Innanzitutto vorrei ringraziare Cédric e la sua famiglia per l'accoglienza, l...

it.alt: Posto meraviglioso. Situato in una zona splendida, lo studio sembrava molto più grande e aveva tutto il necessario.
it.author: Fabienne
it.caption: Posto meraviglioso

it.alt: Posso solo raccomandarlo. Ero lì per lavoro, ma tutto è stato molto piacevole.
it.author: Helmut
it.caption: Posso solo raccomandarlo

it.alt: Ho soggiornato qui per più di un mese. Troverete tutto ciò di cui avete bisogno nello studio. Una cucina molto ben attrezzata, televisione con chromecast e apple tv, una buona doccia, lavatrice, asciugatrice. Per me è stato perfetto!
it.author: Joey
it.caption: Ho soggiornato qui per più di un mese

it.alt: Cédric e Céline sono padroni di casa incredibili e sono sempre stati felici di aiutare. Ho soggiornato nello studio per un periodo relativamente lungo ed è estremamente ben attrezzato, pulito, spazioso e ben posizionato in una bellissima zona con collegamenti di trasporto. Un vero gioiello 😁
it.author: Guest
it.caption: Cédric e Céline sono padroni di casa incredibili e sono sempre stati felici di aiutare

nl.alt: Cédric is an excellent host. We stayed at the studio for roughly ~3 months. First, the location is beautiful - peace is what you will find there. It is conveniently close to a supermarket, a restaurants, and train stop (13 min walk) Walking from the studio to the train stop, you will meet goats, sheep, cows and horses while appreciating the Fribourgeois landscape. Cedric was always attentive and was fully invested in assisting us whenever we needed, and it is easy to have a nice conversation with him. With his guidance, we learned so much about the area, where to find, how to get around, etc. If you are looking to explore Switzerland 🇨🇭 and/or you consider staying in Fribourg, I give my strongest recommendation to C&C Eco Studio!
nl.author: Etienne Palos
nl.caption: Cédric is an excellent host

nl.alt: Very friendly and responsive host. We will come back. Very peaceful and charming place.
nl.author: Florence Berguerre
nl.caption: Very friendly and responsive host

nl.alt: Value for Money. A very complete studio, just feel like home and you have what you need. A very complete kitchen facility. Not really... things were really fine.
nl.author: Cheong7
nl.caption: Value for Money

nl.alt: Superbe studio dans un quartier calme avec tout le confort. Propriétaires très sympathiques. Logement tout équipé avec lave-vaisselle, lave-linge et sèche-linge. Lit confortable.
nl.author: Joao
nl.caption: Superbe studio dans un quartier calme avec tout le confort

nl.alt: Excellent rapport qualité-prix, idéal pour visiter la Suisse romande. Calme, au milieu des animaux. Gentillesse des propriétaires, lave-linge, lave-vaisselle et cuisine équipée.
nl.author: Laura
nl.caption: Excellent rapport qualité-prix, idéal pour visiter la Suisse romande

nl.alt: Nice little apartment with everything you need. I would love to come back.
nl.author: Christian
nl.caption: Nice little apartment with everything you need

nl.alt: Great studio in a quiet area with all amenities. Friendly owners. Fully equipped accommodation with dishwasher, washing machine and dryer. Comfortable bed.
nl.author: Joao
nl.caption: Great studio in a quiet area with all amenities

nl.alt: Top hosts, always available. Small studio on the ground floor, ideal for a couple with 2 children. Photos are 100% accurate. Located in the countryside, very quiet and close to everything.
nl.author: Pedro
nl.caption: Top hosts, always available

nl.alt: Fabulous. The location and the calm. Close to everything
nl.author: Buckinx-finck
nl.caption: Fabulous

nl.alt: Exceptional. Very peaceful location... very well equipped apartment, thanks to Cédric for the little toys for our 6 year old son.
nl.author: Zakia
nl.caption: Exceptional

nl.alt: In the countryside and yet 5 minutes from the city. Very quiet. The hosts were very helpful and just great. Great apartment equipped with everything. I would love to come back.
nl.author: Monika
nl.caption: In the countryside and yet 5 minutes from the city

nl.alt: Happy with the stay at Cédric's family, welcoming and attentive. Ideal for tranquility and landscapes.
nl.author: Slim
nl.caption: Happy with the stay at Cédric's family, welcoming and attentive

nl.alt: We had a great stay at C&C Eco Studio. Cédric and Céline are superb very welcoming and friendly hosts. The studio is perfectly equipped to live independently both short and long term. I would highly recommend, you will not be disappointed!
nl.author: Paul
nl.caption: We had a great stay at C&C Eco Studio

nl.alt: First of all, I want to thank Cédric and his family for their welcome, sympathy and their great sense of hospitality as well as their presence and discretion. The apartment is very well located in a quiet area. The motorway is less than 10 mins away. And the station, shops and post office about ten minutes away on foot. Having stayed in this apartment several times, I can only recommend it with a score of 10/10!!!
nl.author: Danila
nl.caption: First of all, I want to thank Cédric and his family for their welcome, sympat...

nl.alt: Wonderful place to stay. It’s in an absolutely stunning area and the studio didn’t feel like a studio, it felt much bigger and it had everything I needed.
nl.author: Fabienne
nl.caption: Wonderful place to stay

nl.alt: I can only recommend it. I was there for work, but everything was very pleasant.
nl.author: Helmut
nl.caption: I can only recommend it

nl.alt: Ik verbleef hier meer dan een maand. Je vindt alles wat je nodig hebt in de studio. Een zeer goed uitgeruste keuken, televisie met Chromecast en Apple TV, een goede douche, wasmachine, droger. Voor mij was het perfect!
nl.author: Joey
nl.caption: Ik verbleef hier meer dan een maand

nl.alt: Cédric en Céline zijn fantastische gastheren en hielpen altijd graag. Ik ben relatief lang in de studio gebleven en het is extreem goed uitgerust, schoon, ruim en goed gelegen in een prachtige omgeving met goede verbindingen. Werkelijk een pareltje 😁
nl.author: Guest
nl.caption: Cédric en Céline zijn fantastische gastheren en hielpen altijd graag.

fr.alt: Lieu calme à la campagne. L'accueil des propriétaires. Les services à disposition 👍
fr.author: Lisa
fr.caption: Lieu calme à la campagne

fr.alt: Super spot, supers hôtes, on se sent comme à la maison dans notre van mais plus de confort avec les sanitaires, la wifi et la terrasse à dispo. :) Cyril et Céline sont très sympathiques. Si je devais retourner dans ce coin je les solliciterai pour sûre!
fr.author: Marie Bretaudeau
fr.caption: Super spot, supers hôtes, on se sent comme à la maison dans notre van mais pl...

fr.alt: Impeccable ! Accés toilette et douche + prise ainsi qu'une belle terrasse. Accueil Facile et place pour se garer assez large.
fr.author: Mathieu
fr.caption: Impeccable

fr.alt: Exceptionnel. Ce client n'a pas laissé de commentaire.
fr.author: Marika
fr.caption: Exceptionnel

fr.alt: Comme l'indique la page. Nous avons passé deux nuits très confortables et paisibles avec notre camping-car. Les hôtes étaient très gentils et nous ont donné toutes les informations nécessaires. Nous recommandons !
fr.author: Gonzalo Pelaez
fr.caption: Comme l'indique la page

fr.alt: L'emplacement était idéal pour nous. Des hôtes charmants et un paysage magnifique depuis la terrasse. Pas de vidange d'eaux noires sur place, et le WiFi était un peu faible.
fr.author: Biton
fr.caption: L'emplacement était idéal pour nous

fr.alt: Lieu accueillant et calme. Nous y avons passé quelques mois et nous repartons très contents. Voisinage aimable. Tranquillité absolue, on se sent vraiment comme à la maison.
fr.author: Marc Casals
fr.caption: Lieu accueillant et calme

fr.alt: Je choisirais sans hésiter cet endroit pour mon prochain voyage. Cédric a été très serviable pour la réservation. Le village est au cœur de la campagne suisse, l'air est pur et les paysages superbes pour la marche. Le trajet à vélo vers Fribourg est aussi très agréable.
fr.author: Onur
fr.caption: Je choisirais sans hésiter cet endroit pour mon prochain voyage

fr.alt: Environnement calme et agréable. L'emplacement est pratique et agréable, Cedrick et sa famille sont très gentils.
fr.author: Natacha
fr.caption: Environnement calme et agréable

fr.alt: Un accueil plein de gentillesse, Cédric nous a donné toutes les informations nécessaires, un emplacement très agréable, calme près des pâturages et des animaux de la ferme, idéal pour promener nos chiens. Encore merci à Cedric.
fr.author: jean-philippe worms
fr.caption: Un accueil plein de gentillesse, Cédric nous a donné toutes les informations ...

fr.alt: Place de parc dispo pour la saison estivale. Hôte agréable. Je recommande vivement
fr.author: Ayoub ("L'inspecteur")
fr.caption: Place de parc dispo pour la saison estivale

fr.alt: Mon mari et moi avons séjourné avec notre camping-car de 7 mètres chez Cédric et Céline et nous avons apprécié chaque minute. Ils sont tous les deux extrêmement gentils et vous aident pour tout ce dont vous avez besoin. L'eau et l'électricité sont faciles d'accès et il y a une belle terrasse. Le train est à distance de marche pour se rendre à Fribourg/Berne. Excellent rapport qualité-prix. Nous reviendrons sans hésiter.
fr.author: Shiri Amir
fr.caption: Mon mari et moi avons séjourné avec notre camping-car de 7 mètres chez Cédric...

fr.alt: Nous avons été très bien accueillis par Cédric et sa famille. L'endroit est fonctionnel et parfait pour un séjour aux portes de Fribourg. C'est sûr que nous reviendrons avec grand plaisir!
fr.author: Sophie rb
fr.caption: Nous avons été très bien accueillis par Cédric et sa famille

en.alt: Quiet place in the countryside. Friendly welcome from the owners. Services available 👍
en.author: Lisa
en.caption: Quiet place in the countryside

en.alt: Super spot, super hosts, we feel at home in our van but with more comfort thanks to the toilets, wifi and terrace available. :) Cyril and Céline are very friendly. I would definitely come back!
en.author: Marie Bretaudeau
en.caption: Super spot, super hosts, we feel at home in our van but with more comfort tha...

en.alt: Impeccable! Access to toilet and shower + socket as well as a beautiful terrace. Easy welcome and wide parking space.
en.author: Mathieu
en.caption: Impeccable

en.alt: Exceptional. This customer did not leave a comment.
en.author: Marika
en.caption: Exceptional

en.alt: Just as described. We spent two very comfortable and quiet nights with our motorhome. Both hosts were very kind and gave us all the necessary information. We definitely recommend!
en.author: Gonzalo Pelaez
en.caption: Just as described

en.alt: The location was great for us and our plans. Nice hosts, and a very beautiful landscape from the patio. They do not have a place to empty black water, and the WiFi was weak.
en.author: Biton
en.caption: The location was great for us and our plans

en.alt: Great spot for a quiet night. High speed wifi works well.
en.author: Traveler
en.caption: Great spot for a quiet night

en.alt: I would definitely prefer their place for my next trip. Cedric was really helpful with all aspects of the booking. Village is located in the heart of Swiss countryside so I enjoyed a lot of fresh air and lovely scenery for walking. Cycling to and from Fribourg center and shopping area was also a nice experience.
en.author: Onur
en.caption: I would definitely prefer their place for my next trip

en.alt: Quiet and pleasant environment. The location is practical and pleasant, Cedrick and his family are very kind.
en.author: Natacha
en.caption: Quiet and pleasant environment

en.alt: A very kind welcome, Cédric gave us all the necessary information, a very pleasant plot, quiet near the pastures and farm animals, ideal for walking our dogs. Thanks again to Cedric.
en.author: jean-philippe worms
en.caption: A very kind welcome, Cédric gave us all the necessary information, a very ple...

en.alt: Parking space available for the summer season. Pleasant host. I highly recommend
en.author: Ayoub ("L'inspecteur")
en.caption: Parking space available for the summer season

en.alt: My husband and I stayed with our 7 Meter camper at Cedric and Céline's house and enjoyed every minute. They are both extremely nice and kind and help you out with anything you need. You can hookup to water and electricity very easily and they have a nice terrace to sit and have a sunny breakfast/lunch overlooking the beautiful countryside horizons of Fribourg. You can use the train within a walking distance to get to Fribourg/Bern. A very good price for a very good value. We will definitely come again.
en.author: Shiri Amir
en.caption: My husband and I stayed with our 7 Meter camper at Cedric and Céline's house ...

en.alt: We were very well received by Cédric and his family. The place is functional and perfect for a stay at the gates of Fribourg. We will definitely come back with great pleasure!
en.author: Sophie rb
en.caption: We were very well received by Cédric and his family

de.alt: Ruhiger Ort auf dem Land. Herzlicher Empfang durch die Eigentümer. Dienstleistungen verfügbar 👍
de.author: Lisa
de.caption: Ruhiger Ort auf dem Land

de.alt: Super Spot, super Gastgeber, wir fühlen uns in unserem Van wie zu Hause, aber mit mehr Komfort dank Toiletten, WLAN und Terrasse. :) Cyril und Céline sind sehr freundlich. Ich würde definitiv wiederkommen!
de.author: Marie Bretaudeau
de.caption: Super Spot, super Gastgeber, wir fühlen uns in unserem Van wie zu Hause, aber...

de.alt: Tadellos! Zugang zu Toilette und Dusche + Steckdose sowie eine schöne Terrasse. Einfacher Empfang und breiter Parkplatz.
de.author: Mathieu
de.caption: Tadellos

de.alt: Außergewöhnlich. Dieser Kunde hat keinen Kommentar hinterlassen.
de.author: Marika
de.caption: Außergewöhnlich

de.alt: Wie beschrieben. Wir haben zwei sehr komfortable und ruhige Nächte mit unserem Wohnmobil verbracht. Beide Gastgeber waren sehr nett und gaben uns alle Informationen. Wir empfehlen es definitiv!
de.author: Gonzalo Pelaez
de.caption: Wie beschrieben

de.alt: Die Lage war ideal für uns und unsere Pläne. Nette Gastgeber und eine sehr schöne Aussicht von der Terrasse. Keine Entsorgung für Schwarzwasser vor Ort, und das WLAN war schwach.
de.author: Biton
de.caption: Die Lage war ideal für uns und unsere Pläne

de.alt: Gemütlicher und ruhiger Ort. Wir waren ein paar Monate hier und sind sehr zufrieden. Freundliche Nachbarn. Absolute Ruhe, man fühlt sich wirklich wie zu Hause.
de.author: Marc Casals
de.caption: Gemütlicher und ruhiger Ort

de.alt: Ich würde diesen Ort definitiv für meine nächste Reise bevorzugen. Cédric war bei allen Aspekten der Buchung sehr hilfreich. Das Dorf liegt im Herzen der Schweizer Landschaft, viel frische Luft und schöne Wanderwege. Radfahren nach Freiburg war auch eine tolle Erfahrung.
de.author: Onur
de.caption: Ich würde diesen Ort definitiv für meine nächste Reise bevorzugen

de.alt: Ruhige und angenehme Umgebung. Die Lage ist praktisch und angenehm, Cedrick und seine Familie sind sehr nett.
de.author: Natacha
de.caption: Ruhige und angenehme Umgebung

de.alt: Ein sehr herzlicher Empfang, Cédric hat uns alle notwendigen Informationen gegeben, ein sehr angenehmer Platz, ruhig in der Nähe von Weiden und Bauernhoftieren, ideal für Spaziergänge mit unseren Hunden. Nochmals vielen Dank an Cedric.
de.author: jean-philippe worms
de.caption: Ein sehr herzlicher Empfang, Cédric hat uns alle notwendigen Informationen ge...

de.alt: Parkplatz für die Sommersaison verfügbar. Angenehmer Gastgeber. Ich empfehle es sehr
de.author: Ayoub ("L'inspecteur")
de.caption: Parkplatz für die Sommersaison verfügbar

de.alt: Mein Mann und ich waren mit unserem 7-Meter-Wohnmobil bei Cédric und Céline und haben jede Minute genossen. Beide sind extrem nett und helfen bei allem. Wasser- und Stromanschluss sind einfach, und es gibt eine schöne Terrasse. Der Bahnhof ist zu Fuß erreichbar. Sehr gutes Preis-Leistungs-Verhältnis. Wir kommen auf jeden Fall wieder.
de.author: Shiri Amir
de.caption: Mein Mann und ich waren mit unserem 7-Meter-Wohnmobil bei Cédric und Céline u...

de.alt: Wir wurden von Cédric und seiner Familie sehr gut empfangen. Der Ort ist funktional und perfekt für einen Aufenthalt vor den Toren Freiburgs. Wir kommen gerne wieder!
de.author: Sophie rb
de.caption: Wir wurden von Cédric und seiner Familie sehr gut empfangen

es.alt: Lugar tranquilo en el campo. Bienvenida amable de los propietarios. Servicios disponibles 👍
es.author: Lisa
es.caption: Lugar tranquilo en el campo

es.alt: Súper lugar, súper anfitriones, nos sentimos como en casa en nuestra furgoneta pero con más comodidad gracias a los baños, wifi y terraza. :) Cyril y Céline son muy amables. ¡Definitivamente volvería!
es.author: Marie Bretaudeau
es.caption: Súper lugar, súper anfitriones, nos sentimos como en casa en nuestra furgonet...

es.alt: ¡Impecable! Acceso a baño y ducha + enchufe además de una hermosa terraza. Bienvenida fácil y plaza de aparcamiento amplia.
es.author: Mathieu
es.caption: ¡Impecable

es.alt: Excepcional. Este cliente no dejó ningún comentario.
es.author: Marika
es.caption: Excepcional

es.alt: Tal como dice la página. Pasamos dos noches muy cómodos y tranquilos con nuestro motorhome en lo de Cedric y Celine. Ambos anfitriones fueron muy amables y nos dieron toda la información necesaria. Con total seguridad lo recomendamos.
es.author: Gonzalo Pelaez
es.caption: Tal como dice la página

es.alt: La ubicación fue genial para nosotros. Buenos anfitriones y un paisaje muy hermoso desde el patio. No tienen lugar para vaciar aguas negras y el WiFi era débil.
es.author: Biton
es.caption: La ubicación fue genial para nosotros

es.alt: Lugar acogedor y tranquilo. Hemos estado aqui unos meses y nos vamos muy contentos. Los vecinos son amables y nunca hemos tenido más que buenas palabras con ellos. Tranquilidad y la sensación de que nadie va a condicionar tu dia ni te va a molestar por nada. Esto es lo que hace que te sientas como en casa.
es.author: Marc Casals
es.caption: Lugar acogedor y tranquilo

es.alt: Sin duda elegiría este lugar para mi próximo viaje. Cédric fue muy servicial con la reserva. El pueblo está en el corazón del campo suizo, aire puro y paisajes preciosos para caminar. El trayecto en bici a Friburgo también es agradable.
es.author: Onur
es.caption: Sin duda elegiría este lugar para mi próximo viaje

es.alt: Entorno tranquilo y agradable. La ubicación es práctica y agradable, Cedrick y su familia son muy amables.
es.author: Natacha
es.caption: Entorno tranquilo y agradable

es.alt: Una bienvenida muy amable, Cédric nos dio toda la información necesaria, una parcela muy agradable, tranquila cerca de los pastos y animales de granja, ideal para pasear a nuestros perros. Gracias de nuevo a Cedric.
es.author: jean-philippe worms
es.caption: Una bienvenida muy amable, Cédric nos dio toda la información necesaria, una ...

es.alt: Plaza de aparcamiento disponible para la temporada de verano. Anfitrión agradable. Lo recomiendo mucho
es.author: Ayoub ("L'inspecteur")
es.caption: Plaza de aparcamiento disponible para la temporada de verano

es.alt: Mi esposo y yo nos quedamos con nuestra autocaravana de 7 metros en casa de Cédric y Céline y disfrutamos cada minuto. Ambos son extremadamente amables y te ayudan con lo que necesites. El agua y la electricidad son fáciles de conectar y hay una hermosa terraza. El tren está a poca distancia para ir a Friburgo/Berna. Excelente relación calidad-precio. Sin duda volveremos.
es.author: Shiri Amir
es.caption: Mi esposo y yo nos quedamos con nuestra autocaravana de 7 metros en casa de C...

es.alt: Fuimos muy bien recibidos por Cédric y su familia. El lugar es funcional y perfecto para una estancia a las puertas de Friburgo. ¡Seguro que volveremos con mucho gusto!
es.author: Sophie rb
es.caption: Fuimos muy bien recibidos por Cédric y su familia

pt.alt: Lugar tranquilo no campo. Acolhimento caloroso dos proprietários. Serviços disponíveis 👍
pt.author: Lisa
pt.caption: Lugar tranquilo no campo

pt.alt: Excelente spot, excelentes anfitriões, sentimo-nos em casa na nossa carrinha mas com mais conforto graças às casas de banho, wifi e terraço. :) Cyril e Céline são muito simpáticos. Voltaria com certeza!
pt.author: Marie Bretaudeau
pt.caption: Excelente spot, excelentes anfitriões, sentimo-nos em casa na nossa carrinha ...

pt.alt: Impecável! Acesso a casa de banho e duche + tomada, bem como um belo terraço. Acolhimento fácil e lugar de estacionamento amplo.
pt.author: Mathieu
pt.caption: Impecável

pt.alt: Excecional. Este cliente não deixou um comentário.
pt.author: Marika
pt.caption: Excecional

pt.alt: Exatamente como descrito. Passámos duas noites muito confortáveis e tranquilas com a nossa autocaravana. Ambos os anfitriões foram muito amáveis. Recomendamos com total segurança!
pt.author: Gonzalo Pelaez
pt.caption: Exatamente como descrito

pt.alt: A localização foi ótima para nós. Bons anfitriões e uma paisagem muito bonita do pátio. Não têm local para despejar águas negras e o WiFi era fraco.
pt.author: Biton
pt.caption: A localização foi ótima para nós

pt.alt: Lugar acolhedor e tranquilo. Estivemos aqui alguns meses e estamos muito felizes. Vizinhos amigáveis. Tranquilidade absoluta, sentimo-nos realmente em casa.
pt.author: Marc Casals
pt.caption: Lugar acolhedor e tranquilo

pt.alt: Escolheria sem dúvida este lugar para a minha próxima viagem. Cédric foi muito prestável com a reserva. A aldeia fica no coração do campo suíço, ar puro e paisagens belíssimas para caminhar. O trajeto de bicicleta para Friburgo também é agradável.
pt.author: Onur
pt.caption: Escolheria sem dúvida este lugar para a minha próxima viagem

pt.alt: Ambiente calmo e agradável. A localização é prática e agradável, Cedrick e a sua família são muito simpáticos.
pt.author: Natacha
pt.caption: Ambiente calmo e agradável

pt.alt: Um acolhimento muito amável, Cédric deu-nos todas as informações necessárias, um lugar muito agradável, tranquilo perto das pastagens e animais da quinta, ideal para passear os nossos cães. Obrigado novamente ao Cedric.
pt.author: jean-philippe worms
pt.caption: Um acolhimento muito amável, Cédric deu-nos todas as informações necessárias,...

pt.alt: Lugar de estacionamento disponível para a temporada de verão. Anfitrião agradável. Recomendo vivamente
pt.author: Ayoub ("L'inspecteur")
pt.caption: Lugar de estacionamento disponível para a temporada de verão

pt.alt: O meu marido e eu ficámos com a nossa autocaravana de 7 metros na casa do Cédric e da Céline e desfrutámos de cada minuto. Ambos são extremamente gentis e ajudam em tudo o que for necessário. A ligação de água e eletricidade é fácil e há um belo terraço. O comboio fica a uma curta distância a pé para ir a Friburgo/Berna. Excelente relação qualidade-preço. Voltaremos de certeza.
pt.author: Shiri Amir
pt.caption: O meu marido e eu ficámos com a nossa autocaravana de 7 metros na casa do Céd...

pt.alt: Fomos muito bem recebidos pelo Cédric e pela sua família. O local é funcional e perfeito para uma estadia às portas de Friburgo. Com certeza voltaremos com muito prazer!
pt.author: Sophie rb
pt.caption: Fomos muito bem recebidos pelo Cédric e pela sua família

it.alt: Posto tranquillo in campagna. Accoglienza calorosa dei proprietari. Servizi disponibili 👍
it.author: Lisa
it.caption: Posto tranquillo in campagna

it.alt: Ottimo posto, ottimi padroni di casa, ci sentiamo a casa nel nostro van ma con più comfort grazie a bagni, wifi e terrazza. :) Cyril e Céline sono molto gentili. Tornerei sicuramente!
it.author: Marie Bretaudeau
it.caption: Ottimo posto, ottimi padroni di casa, ci sentiamo a casa nel nostro van ma co...

it.alt: Impeccabile! Accesso a bagno e doccia + presa e una bella terrazza. Accoglienza facile e parcheggio ampio.
it.author: Mathieu
it.caption: Impeccabile

it.alt: Eccezionale. Questo cliente non ha lasciato un commento.
it.author: Marika
it.caption: Eccezionale

it.alt: Come descritto. Abbiamo trascorso due notti molto confortevoli e tranquille con il nostro camper. Entrambi i padroni di casa sono stati molto gentili. Lo raccomandiamo sicuramente!
it.author: Gonzalo Pelaez
it.caption: Come descritto

it.alt: La posizione era ottima per noi. Padroni di casa gentili e un paesaggio molto bello dal patio. Non c'è uno scarico per le acque nere e il WiFi era debole.
it.author: Biton
it.caption: La posizione era ottima per noi

it.alt: Posto accogliente e tranquillo. Siamo stati qui per qualche mese e siamo molto felici. Vicini amichevoli. Tranquillità assoluta, ci si sente davvero a casa.
it.author: Marc Casals
it.caption: Posto accogliente e tranquillo

it.alt: Sceglierei sicuramente questo posto per il mio prossimo viaggio. Cédric è stato molto utile con la prenotazione. Il villaggio si trova nel cuore della campagna svizzera, aria fresca e splendidi paesaggi per camminare. Anche il percorso in bici verso Friburgo è una bella esperienza.
it.author: Onur
it.caption: Sceglierei sicuramente questo posto per il mio prossimo viaggio

it.alt: Ambiente calmo e piacevole. La posizione è pratica e piacevole, Cedrick e la sua famiglia sono molto gentili.
it.author: Natacha
it.caption: Ambiente calmo e piacevole

it.alt: Un'accoglienza molto gentile, Cédric ci ha dato tutte le informazioni necessarie, una piazzola molto piacevole, tranquilla vicino ai pascoli e agli animali della fattoria, ideale per passeggiare con i nostri cani. Grazie ancora a Cedric.
it.author: jean-philippe worms
it.caption: Un'accoglienza molto gentile, Cédric ci ha dato tutte le informazioni necessa...

it.alt: Posto auto disponibile per la stagione estiva. Ospite piacevole. Lo raccomando vivamente
it.author: Ayoub ("L'inspecteur")
it.caption: Posto auto disponibile per la stagione estiva

it.alt: Io e mio marito abbiamo soggiornato con il nostro camper di 7 metri da Cédric e Céline e abbiamo apprezzato ogni minuto. Sono entrambi estremamente gentili e disponibili. L'allacciamento ad acqua ed elettricità è facile e c'è una bella terrazza. La stazione è raggiungibile a piedi per andare a Friburgo/Berna. Ottimo rapporto qualità-prezzo. Torneremo sicuramente.
it.author: Shiri Amir
it.caption: Io e mio marito abbiamo soggiornato con il nostro camper di 7 metri da Cédric...

it.alt: Siamo stati accolti molto bene da Cédric e dalla sua famiglia. Il posto è funzionale e perfetto per un soggiorno alle porte di Friburgo. Torneremo sicuramente con grande piacere!
it.author: Sophie rb
it.caption: Siamo stati accolti molto bene da Cédric e dalla sua famiglia

nl.alt: Quiet place in the countryside. Friendly welcome from the owners. Services available 👍
nl.author: Lisa
nl.caption: Quiet place in the countryside

nl.alt: Super spot, super hosts, we feel at home in our van but with more comfort thanks to the toilets, wifi and terrace available. :) Cyril and Céline are very friendly. I would definitely come back!
nl.author: Marie Bretaudeau
nl.caption: Super spot, super hosts, we feel at home in our van but with more comfort tha...

nl.alt: Impeccable! Access to toilet and shower + socket as well as a beautiful terrace. Easy welcome and wide parking space.
nl.author: Mathieu
nl.caption: Impeccable

nl.alt: Exceptional. This customer did not leave a comment.
nl.author: Marika
nl.caption: Exceptional

nl.alt: Just as described. We spent two very comfortable and quiet nights with our motorhome. Both hosts were very kind and gave us all the necessary information. We definitely recommend!
nl.author: Gonzalo Pelaez
nl.caption: Just as described

nl.alt: The location was great for us and our plans. Nice hosts, and a very beautiful landscape from the patio. They do not have a place to empty black water, and the WiFi was weak.
nl.author: Biton
nl.caption: The location was great for us and our plans

nl.alt: Great spot for a quiet night. High speed wifi works well.
nl.author: Traveler
nl.caption: Great spot for a quiet night

nl.alt: I would definitely prefer their place for my next trip. Cedric was really helpful with all aspects of the booking. Village is located in the heart of Swiss countryside so I enjoyed a lot of fresh air and lovely scenery for walking. Cycling to and from Fribourg center and shopping area was also a nice experience.
nl.author: Onur
nl.caption: I would definitely prefer their place for my next trip

nl.alt: Quiet and pleasant environment. The location is practical and pleasant, Cedrick and his family are very kind.
nl.author: Natacha
nl.caption: Quiet and pleasant environment

nl.alt: A very kind welcome, Cédric gave us all the necessary information, a very pleasant plot, quiet near the pastures and farm animals, ideal for walking our dogs. Thanks again to Cedric.
nl.author: jean-philippe worms
nl.caption: A very kind welcome, Cédric gave us all the necessary information, a very ple...

nl.alt: Parking space available for the summer season. Pleasant host. I highly recommend
nl.author: Ayoub ("L'inspecteur")
nl.caption: Parking space available for the summer season

nl.alt: My husband and I stayed with our 7 Meter camper at Cedric and Céline's house and enjoyed every minute. They are both extremely nice and kind and help you out with anything you need. You can hookup to water and electricity very easily and they have a nice terrace to sit and have a sunny breakfast/lunch overlooking the beautiful countryside horizons of Fribourg. You can use the train within a walking distance to get to Fribourg/Bern. A very good price for a very good value. We will definitely come again.
nl.author: Shiri Amir
nl.caption: My husband and I stayed with our 7 Meter camper at Cedric and Céline's house ...

nl.alt: We were very well received by Cédric and his family. The place is functional and perfect for a stay at the gates of Fribourg. We will definitely come back with great pleasure!
nl.author: Sophie rb
nl.caption: We were very well received by Cédric and his family
